textByHashes.acab9a346e0c4ad80133fe3a76d9e29752e18e43: That I am. Why? Has he killed one of your family?
textByHashes.47cc8897f0b948399e3515515deddf85ae369f5b: Oh good, how can I help you?
textByHashes.64bfad2007c937fd0a9189805edd031b9e9c36b7: I'm afraid he's not easy to talk to, so it's good that you came to see me. You'll need to remember a few things when talking to him.
textByHashes.e539aa8b953e3315df6ad66b93346dc1e19d9e1c: You must be firm with him and don't mention that I sent you. In case he asks, he wields an iron mace in battle, eats rats for breakfast, kittens for lunch and bunnies for tea!
textByHashes.3ef557e371140c0daad7de780714408ef9681cdd: His favorite drink is red spider blood, he's 36 years, 8 months and 21 days old, studies famous battles of the Fourth and Fifth ages, lives on the North East side of town and his, erm... pet cat is called Fluffy.
textByHashes.c3563a6ede24ae13f6511f15f68eec2669124d6a: I know this sounds strange but Dron won't talk to anyone unless they know him well - he's a secretive guy.
